title: Better Allay
description: Customize how allay differentiates between potions and tipped arrows. Optionally can make allays pick up items even when mob griefing is off and set time for how long allay likes noteblock.
body:
# Better Allay

Customize how allay differentiates between potions and tipped arrows. Optionally can make allays pick up items even when mob griefing is off and set time for how long allay likes noteblock or permanently bind allay to noteblock.

## Config 

You can change mod setting by COMMANDS or in CONFIG FILE.

Usually (%appdata% -> .minecraft -> config -> betterallayconfig.properties)

### **Operation\_mode:**

1 = Allays see diference in base potion type (basic potion of strenght is not same as basic potion of regeneration. But basic potion of strenght is same as potion of strenght II)

2 = Allays see diference in base splash potion type (basic splash potion of strenght is not same as basic splash potion of regeneration. But basic splash potion of strenght is same as splash potion of strenght II)

3 = Allays see diference in base lingering potion type (basic lingering potion of strenght is not same as basic lingering potion of regeneration. But basic lingering potion of strenght is same as lingering potion of strenght II)

4 = Allays see diference in base tipped arrow type (basic tipped arrow of strenght is not same as basic tipped arrow of regeneration. But basic tipped arrow of strenght is same as tipped arrow of strenght II)

5 = Allays see diference in potion type and level(basic potion of strenght is not same as basic potion of regeneration AND basic potion of strenght is not same as potion of strenght II)

6 = Allays see diference in splash potion type and level(basic splash potion of strenght is not same as basic splash potion of regeneration AND basic splash potion of strenght is not same as splash potion of strenght II)

7 = Allays see diference in lingering potion type and level(basic lingering potion of strenght is not same as basic lingering potion of regeneration AND basic lingering potion of strenght is not same as lingering potion of strenght II)

8 = Allays see diference in tipped arrow type and level(basic tipped arrow of strenght is not same as basic tipped arrow of regeneration AND But basic tipped arrow of strenght is not same as tipped arrow of strenght II)

9 = 1 and 2

10 = 1 and 3

11 = 1 and 4

12 = 2 and 3

13 = 2 and 4

14 = 3 and 4

15 = 1 and 2 and 3

16 = 2 and 3 and 4

17 = 1 and 3 and 4

18 = 1 and 2 and 4

19 = 1 and 2 and 3 and 4

20 = 5 and 6

21 = 5 and 7

22 = 5 and 8

23 = 6 and 7

24 = 6 and 8

25 = 7 and 8

26 = 5 and 6 and 7

27 = 6 and 7 and 8

28 = 5 and 7 and 8

29 = 5 and 6 and 8

30 = 5 and 6 and 7 and 8

### **Ignore\_mob\_griefing:**

1 = Allays will ignore mob griefing gamerule 0 = Allays wont ignore mob griefing rule

### **Likes\_noteblock\_time:**

Sets time in seconds for how long allay likes noteblock. Minimum is 5 max is 107374182. When set to -1 makes allays permanently connected to noteblock.

### **POTION_TYPES=1** 
1: dont ignore potion types, 0: ignore potion types, -1: ignore potion types but sort tipped arrows separately (ignoring potion types means that for example lingering potion of regen will be sorted with splash poting of regen)

## FAQ

### **I have an issue / bug / crash / report / request, where can I contact you about it ?**

Use my Discord server, you can join it by clicking link on the right. https://discord.gg/y366spsSjv

### **Can I put this mod into my modpack ?**

Yes you can, but without reuploading/redistributing the mod as yours and giving credit where credit is due.

### **Does this mod support servers ?**

Yes it does.

### **Can players use this mod to grief on servers ?**

Absolutely not. This mod is required on server itself to work.
